name: the-seven-spiritual-laws
description: Deepak Chopra's 'The Seven Spiritual Laws of Success' — 7 laws for achieving success and fulfillment by aligning with the natural principles of the universe, from pure potentiality to dharma.
useCase: Find purpose, reduce stress, manifest desires, practice detachment, and experience true abundance through spiritual principles.
knownRisks: Spiritual framework — may not resonate with strictly materialist perspectives
Some concepts (quantum field, pure potentiality) are poetic rather than scientific
Could be interpreted as passive or fatalistic if detachment is misunderstood
